en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Register of Enterprises Certificate in the Italy Register of Enterprises Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Please enter the issue date of your Register of Enterprises Certificate.
Please enter your expiration date 6 months after the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your Register of Enterprises Certificate.

In Italy, all companies must obtain a Register of Enterprises Certificate to certify registration in the national Business Register maintained by the local Chambers of Commerce. The certificate acts as official proof of a business’s legal existence and compliance. The Register of Enterprises Certificate is kept by the network of the Chambers of Commerce and registration takes place in the same way as for the National Business Register.\n\nThe Register of Enterprises Certificate can be requested digitally through chamber of commerce websites or at the local chamber office, with official documents and notifications sent via certified email. Registration is completed digitally via the Single Business Communication portal.
Please upload your Register of Enterprises Certificate issued within the last 6 months.
